spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Ultra-minimalist, generous padding (p-4 to p-6 for containers), no clutter.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-80 or w-96 on desktop, border-r border-border, full height.
spacing_and_layout.admin_dashboard: Control room grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4.
spacing_and_layout.chat_bubbles: px-4 py-2 max-w-[70%] rounded-2xl. Sender: rounded-br-sm. Receiver: rounded-bl-sm.

components.buttons: rounded-lg font-semibold, pure primary color or subtle gray for secondary.
components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-border rounded-full px-4 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. No heavy box shadows.

motion_and_interactions.message_appear: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
motion_and_interactions.typing_indicator: Three small bouncing dots in a gray bubble.

app_logo.description: Minimal abstract logo for the top bar

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and Figtree for body. Add to index.css with @import url.
Implement light and dark mode toggling using standard tailwind 'dark' class.
For the main chat UI: Use a 2-pane layout (Sidebar + Chat) on desktop. Mobile should stack and show only one view at a time.
Left Sidebar: List of recent chats with avatar, name, last message snippet, and unread dot. Search bar at top.
Middle Panel: Active chat window. Top bar with user info, status dot, and action icons. Bottom area: Input field with rounded-full border, emoji picker trigger, send button.

Message Bubbles: Sent messages must be right-aligned with 'bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm'. Received messages left-aligned with 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#262626] text-black dark:text-white rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm'.
Admin Dashboard: Accessible at /admin. Use 'Control Room Grid' with dense data presentation. Allow admins to select any user and view their conversations.
Use standard WebSocket libraries for real-time capabilities. Add visual typing indicators and seen ticks.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g. data-testid='send-message-button', data-testid='chat-input').
App Logo and Avatars must be mapped directly from the image_urls block provided.
Important: Generate javascript files (.jsx/.js) not typescript (.tsx) as instructed.
